AI Business Insights
8 auto-generated findings · FY 2023
📍
Top Region
**South** generates the most revenue at $28,332. **East** has the lowest at $15,442, creating a $12,890 gap. Consider reallocating sales resources to underperforming regions for higher ROI.
🏆
Best Product
**Laptop Pro 15** leads all products with $31,450 in revenue. Top 5 products drive **72.1%** of total revenue. Expand inventory and marketing for top performers to maximize returns.
📈
Revenue Trend
Total revenue stands at $89,730 with an average order value of $748. Seasonal patterns suggest targeted promotions in peak months could boost revenue further.
🥧
Category Share
Analysis complete. Review the chart for detailed insights.
💰
Profit Margin
**Office Supplies** is the most profitable category at 59.3% margin. **Electronics** has the weakest margin at 43.4%. Improving pricing or reducing costs in low-margin categories could significantly boost profits.
🔮

Analysis complete. Review the chart for detailed insights.

Auto-Detected Column Roles
dateDate — order timestamps (Jan–Dec 2023)
revenueRevenue — primary financial metric ($)
profitProfit — net earnings per transaction
costCost — COGS / expense column
regionRegion — geographic dimension (N/S/E/W)
categoryCategory — product segment (3 groups)
productProduct — item / SKU name (15 products)
customerCustomer — account name
quantityQuantity — units sold per order
